title: Upper Yard Splits the Fighters
description: Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this scene centers on Chopper, Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro. Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I have no time to waste...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: He's shooting something from his hands, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: There you are!! swamp cloud burger!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hah... hah... you saved my life....!! meh...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: How pathetic, requiring aid from the enemy!!

summary: Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.
